VEO Automation: Streamline Your Google Flow Workflow

VEO Automation is a powerful side-panel extension designed to accelerate your Google Flow experience. Eliminate repetitive manual tasks by batch-processing prompts, monitoring progress in real-time, and automating your downloads. Transform Google Flow into a high-performance production pipeline for AI video and image generation.

Key Features:
- Batch Automation: Process entire prompt queues automatically. The extension auto-fills and submits generation jobs, removing the need for manual entry.
- Live Monitoring: Track the status of every prompt directly from your side panel with built-in retry-safe logic for maximum stability.
- Smart Download & File Management: Automatically download results in up to 4K quality. Organize your media with custom subfolders and automated, ordered file renaming.
- Workflow Cloning: Quickly clone workflows from existing audio or video sources to maintain creative consistency.
- Gemini-Assisted Scene Generation: Leverage AI to generate structured scene prompts for long-form content and complex production workflows.

Supported Modes:
- Video Generation:Text to Video, Frame to Video, and Ingredients to Video.
- Image Generation: Text to Image and Ingredients to Image (supporting **Nano Banana** models).
- Advanced Controls: Preset aspect ratios (16:9, 1:1, 9:16), per-prompt configuration, and robust timeout handling for long-running queues.

Best For:
- Content Creators: Individuals looking to scale their AI media output.
- Production Teams: Teams requiring standardized, high-volume workflows for video and image assets.
- Power Users: Anyone seeking to automate manual tasks and increase efficiency on Google Flow.

Technical Specifications:
- Output Quality: Images (1K, 2K, 4K) and Video (up to 4K).
- Multi-language UI: Supports English, Vietnamese, Chinese, Korean, Japanese, and Spanish.

リンク部分をドラッグ＆ドロップでそのリンク先を新しいタブで開くこともできます。
(You can also drag and drop a link to open it in a new tab.)

タブが開き、選択した文字列を検索します。
（A tab opens and searches for the selected character string.）

画像をドラッグすると、画像の保存もできます。
（You can also save images by dragging them.）

検索するエンジンや、タブの開き方等は設定から行えます。
（You can set the engine you want to search for, how to open tabs, etc., in the settings.）

Enables users with visual impairments or blindness to create, explore, and share data visualizations.

SAS Graphics Accelerator enables users with visual impairments or blindness to create, explore, and share data visualizations. It supports alternative presentations of data visualizations that include enhanced visual rendering, text descriptions, tabular data, and interactive sonification. Sonification uses non-speech audio to convey important information about the graph. See the SAS Graphics Accelerator product page at http://support.sas.com/software/products/graphics-accelerator/ for sample graphs, documentation, and more.
 
Feedback
Your feedback will help shape the next release of SAS Graphics Accelerator. Please send questions or comments to accessibility@sas.com.

Permissions
SAS Graphics Accelerator requires the following browser permissions:
* The "Read your browsing history" permission is required for users to access accessible alternative presentations of graphs and tables within inline frames, also known as "iframes", within web pages and web apps.
* The "Manage your downloads" permission is required for users to quickly access accessible graphs and other files that are saved to the Downloads folder.
